docs.title: Documentation has moved
docs.text:
The CE FranchiseOwner documentation now lives inside the application, under the Help & Docs workspace, where it is kept current and access is controlled by your login.

  • User Guide and Release Notes — available to every signed-in user.
  • Technical and QA reference — restricted to the system administrator.

Please sign in to the app and open Help & Docs from the home screen.

This public site is retained only as a placeholder; it no longer hosts product documentation.
